# pgdesign audit

Audit schema file(s) or directory for issues

## Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--tables` |  | str |  |  | Limit FD discovery to specific tables |
| `--approximate` |  | float |  |  | Approximate FD threshold (0.0 = exact only) |
| `--db` |  | str |  |  | PostgreSQL connection URL |
| `--strict-nf` |  | bool |  |  | Enable strict normal form checking |
| `--json` |  | bool |  |  | Output as JSON |
| `--schema` |  | str |  |  | Schema name |

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `path` | yes | Path(s) to schema file(s) or directory |
